confirm.subject: Confirm your Dibby account
confirm.heading: Welcome to Dibby
confirm.body: Thanks for signing up! Please confirm your email address to get started.
confirm.footer: If you didn't create an account, you can safely ignore this email.

reset.subject: Reset your Dibby password
reset.heading: Password Reset
reset.body: You requested a password reset. Click the button below to set a new password.
reset.footer: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email. Your password will remain unchanged.
